rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015, line 1. PETITIONER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY's Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner GRANTED. Petitioner's application for attorneys costs and fees per CC 2924k(a)(1)&(b) in the amount of $ 1,618.45 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Funds shall be deposited forthwith and trustee shall be discharged. Petitioner prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER JOHNSON VS. SH PROPERTY, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANTS SH PROPERTY, INC., THE BOHAN COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED in part. Low, Ball and Lynch shall be relieved as counsel after pending discovery motion (addressing discovery served on March 11, 2015) is resolved. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for cancellation of instruments. No leave to amend was previously granted. Demurrer to the seventh cause of action is OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: duty, breach of duty and delayed discovery. To the extent Defendant purports to demur to other causes of action and based on other arguments, as these issues are not property outlined in the Notice of Demurrer and Demurrer. Specifically, arguments appearing in the Points and Authorities, but not in the Notice pertain to (1) "sixth cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty" (1:27); (2) eighth cause of action for negligence" (2:7); (3) "cause of actin for declaratory relief" (2:12); (4) failure to include an indispensable party (10:3-26). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUFID ZANANIRI VS. MICHAEL GEORGE CARLI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Deft Kendall Freeman 1) To Provide Written Responses To Form Interrogatories; 2) To Provide Written Responses To Special Interrogatories; 3) To Produce Documents In Response To Request For Production; And 4) To Pay Monetary Santions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 26, 2015, line 9. PLAINTIFF MUFID ZANANIRI'S Motion For Order Compelling Deft Kendall Freeman 1) To Provide Written Responses To Form Interrogatories; 2) To Provide Written Responses To Special Interrogatories; 3) To Produce Documents In Response To Request For Production; And 4) To Pay Monetary Santions DENIED. No proof of service for the discovery at issue. Counsel's statement that he "caused" the discovery "to be placed in the Unites States mail" is insufficient. = (501/REQ)
